overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Max Buffer ETF - May (PMMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one-year period. The exposure is reset annually in May PMMY was launched on Apr 30, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.
